examples: She expected him to ask for a scotch and was rather nonplussed when he asked her to mix him a martini.
St-Germain becomes ubiquitous and it has won fans thanks to a light, flowery taste that is not as cloying as, say, a litchi martini.
Almost everybody had a cigarette in one hand and a martini in the other.
Drink of choice: Martini again, this time made with herb-infused vodka and accompanied by live jazz.
It takes about ten seconds (even less) to get a nice chilled martini or Manhattan.
